title: Common Sense
author: Thomas Paine
content: “A long habit of not thinking a thing wrong, gives it a superficial appearance of being right.”

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
content: “The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.”

title: The Social Contract
author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau
content: “Man is born free, and everywhere he is in chains.”
